executive_summary: The Iran-US conflict has escalated dramatically with confirmed US casualties (3 troops killed) and Iran expanding missile attacks to Gulf allies. The death of Supreme Leader Khamenei has triggered Iran's succession planning while IRGC continues retaliatory strikes. US operations are ahead of schedule according to Trump, and maritime incidents in the Strait of Hormuz have emerged. The conflict is now directly impacting regional partners with UAE, Kuwait, Bahrain, and Jordan reporting casualties from Iranian missiles.
whats_new: US sinks Iranian ship in Gulf of Oman during Operation Epic Fury - direct naval engagement confirmed
Two commercial ships struck near Strait of Hormuz, raising concerns over oil supply chain disruption
Iranian missile attacks on Gulf states escalate: Kuwait (1 dead, 32 injured), UAE (3 dead, 58 injured), Bahrain (hotel strike)
Temporary Leadership Council begins work to replace Khamenei per Iranian Constitution - succession process activated
Trump claims 48 Iranian 'leaders' killed in US attack; operations progressing ahead of schedule
confirmed_events: Three US service members killed, five wounded in Operation Epic Fury - first American casualties confirmed by CENTCOM
Iranian ballistic missiles hit Beit Shemesh, Israel - 8 killed, 27 injured; Jerusalem strike kills 9
Iran launched missiles at Dubai Airport and Sharjah, causing fires - critical UAE infrastructure targeted
IRGC claims 4 ballistic missiles fired at USS Abraham Lincoln - US CENTCOM denies hit, says missiles did not come close
Israeli-US strike on girls school in Iran now confirmed 148 fatalities - major civilian casualty incident
unverified_emerging: Former Iranian President Mahmoud Ahmadinejad reportedly killed in US-Israeli airstrike on Tehran home - single source, unconfirmed
IRGC claims successful strike on USS Abraham Lincoln - US denies, significant discrepancy in reports
Attack in Zanjan, northwestern Iran - details unspecified, potential internal instability or external strike
Seyed Ali Khamenei referenced in IRGC statements - unclear if successor already designated or if this is symbolic

people_travel: Maersk suspended all vessel transits through Strait of Hormuz - commercial shipping halt
Air traffic disruptions at Dubai Airport following Iranian missile strikes
Regional airlines likely rerouting flights away from conflict zones
supply_chain: Two ships hit by projectiles near Strait of Hormuz - maritime chokepoint under threat
Global oil supply chains at risk if Strait of Hormuz remains contested
Maersk suspension indicates major shipping disruption affecting global trade routes
market_macro: Oil prices likely to rise amid Strait of Hormuz incidents and Gulf state attacks
Russia and China calling for cessation of military operations - diplomatic pressure mounting
Regional diplomatic fracture widening as Jordan and Oman condemn Iranian attacks

outlook_24_72h.base_case: The conflict will likely intensify with Iran continuing missile barrages against Israel and Gulf allies while US operations accelerate. Khamenei's death creates leadership uncertainty but Iran has demonstrated continued military capacity. Commercial shipping through Strait of Hormuz will remain disrupted. Gulf states may face additional Iranian strikes as retaliation for their cooperation with US operations.
escalation_risks: Iranian attacks on Gulf allies could drag additional states into conflict
USS Abraham Lincoln incident (whether true or false) carries high escalation potential if repeated
Israel announces intensification of strikes against Iran - Netanyahu ordered continued campaign
Power vacuum in Tehran could lead to internal instability or rash military decisions
outlook_24_72h.de_escalation_pathways: Russia and China have jointly called for end to military operations - limited mediation leverage given their stated neutrality. Iranian succession process may eventually create negotiation opportunity, but current trajectory suggests continued escalation. Gulf state casualties may pressure those countries to seek accommodations with Iran rather than remain aligned with US-Coalition.
